message: Reorder operate panel: auto-move above suggest foreign track
Add train upgrade announcement modal
Widen Zealand landmass for two-track corridor to København
Skip unnecessary pickup stops when AI already carries the good
Allow any milepost on track as auto-move destination, not just cities
Add coin arc animation for trackage rights payments
Enforce major city build-out rule: max 2 builds from major cities per turn
Use player color for destination marker, add Enter key bindings, defer auto-move until Ready
Change destination marker and sidebar accent from cyan to magenta
Add set train destination feature for auto-movement across turns
Clean up saved games lobby: add timestamps, sorting, delete, and player names
Persist foreign track selection throughout operate phase and update backlog
Fix demand card city highlights persisting across turn change
Simplify endgame resolution: use plain round-boundary check
Fix endgame round resolution and add game-over logging
Fix endgame: AI ends turn immediately when win condition met, last-player trigger resolves without extra round
Tournament endgame (equal turns), randomized turn order, early-game ferry penalty, and first-turn overlay
Wire up endgame system and add flood stranding detection
Region-based batch pruning, ferry multiplier removal, affordability fix, and early-game discard bypass
Fix AI turn estimate: count positioning distance for cross-corridor plans
